taxonomy.description: Chaya Skates (pronounced Kaya) comes with over 40 years of experience in roller skating knowledge. The free spirit and vibrant culture of roller skating are the cornerstones of Chaya Skates. The brand is deeply committed to honoring this rich heritage by delivering premium products across all roller skate segments, including ice skating. Chaya Skates believes in the multifaceted lifestyle that roller skating offers—whether you are engaging in full-contact roller derby battles, showcasing creative tricks in bowls and skate parks, expressing yourself in dance and jam sessions, or simply cruising leisurely with friends, Chaya Skates ensures your experience is enriched with fun and passion.

taxonomy.description:
Dream Wheels is an inline skating brand created by Jan Welch with the artistic direction of Jeremy Beightol and Chris Peel. These talented individuals have worked on projects like 4×4, Vicious, Heat, Chroma, Ground Control, Big Wheel Blading, and Daily Bread Magazine.

The Dream Team includes Andrew Broom, Matty Schrock, B. Free, and Michael Kraft. The am team features Viktoria Lova Söderholm, Taylor Popham, Nay Mapalo, and Julia Komenda.

For their initial release: Broom 60/90, B. Free 60/92, Kraft 58/90, and Schrock 58/92. Jeremy Beightol designed these wheels. Additionally, Chris Piasick has designed an 80/87 wheel, and Chris Peel has created the unique Dream logo. In the future, they aim to expand wheel sizes to range between 45mm and 110mm, covering most sizes.

pageAudit.title: Dream Wheels at ProSkaters Place
pageAudit.metaDescription: Dream Wheels is an inline skating brand created by Jan Welch with the artistic direction of Jeremy Beightol and Chris Peel. A spinoff of Big Wheel Blading.

taxonomy.description:
It was back in 1963 that the brand with the slim "mustache" logo came into being close to the town of Sallanches, born from the inspired union of two manufacturing companies with strong ambitions. The partnership between Starflex skis, produced by Synthetic Plastics, and Dynamic resulted in the birth of a new high-performance skis called Dynastar.

This is how the Dynastar adventure began, built around legendary athletes and passionate men and women with the aim of introducing their unique skiability.

At Dynastar they are proud to the very core; their pride is an integral part of the character. Their pride in the victories, the feats of technology, and commitment to manufacturing in France. Their pride at working in the only factory on French soil that still makes skis. Their pride in human values that makes Dynastar a major international brand that feels like one big happy family.

pageAudit.title: Dynastar Alpine Skis
pageAudit.metaDescription: At Dynastar they are proud to the very core. Their pride in the victories, the feats of technology, and commitment to manufacturing in France.

taxonomy.description:
ENNUI is a new concept of protective gear specifically designed for urban sports and all non-motorized wheeled sports. As skaters, their aim is to create protective gear that they would wear themselves. This is the gear that keeps everybody safe and protects bodies against all sorts of injuries while at the same time being unobtrusive, comfortable and looking good while wearing them on the streets.

It doesn’t matter if you are into rollerblading, roller skating, skateboarding, BMX, fixed bikes, Mtb, longboarding, streetboarding or scooter, ENNUI offers a wide range of specialized products to cover your safety needs.

Urban sports are extremely fun, don’t ruin the experience with the wrong gear, choose ENNUI.

pageAudit.title: Ennui Protective Gear: Your Trusted Partner for Urban Sports Safety
pageAudit.metaDescription: Explore the revolutionary Ennui protective gear at ProSkaters Place. Designed specifically for urban and non-motorized wheeled sports enthusiasts.
h2s: ProSkaters Place: Your Premier Destination for Ennui and More

taxonomy.description:
Fischer Sports GmbH is the global leader in Nordic skiing and one of the world's leading brands in Alpine skiing, known for innovation and cutting-edge technology. Fischer is also one of the biggest manufacturers of high-quality ice hockey sticks.

Fischer’s vision is to be the winter athlete’s brand of choice through outstanding products, created for everlasting moments and new levels of individual performance. The privately held company employs 1,500 individuals who all share a passion for and dedication to winter sports.

Fischer Sports GmbH was founded in 1924 in Ried im Innkreis, Austria, where the global headquarters is still located. Manufacturing takes place there and in Ukraine. ONE WAY, a world-famous brand with a special focus on poles for Nordic skiing, Alpine skiing, and Nordic walking has likewise been part of Fischer Sports GmbH since May 2018. Löffler, part of the Fischer group, is also headquartered in Ried im Innkreis.

The products include Alpine Skis and Boots, Nordic Skis and Boots, and various accessories.

pageAudit.title: Explore Fischer Products at ProSkaters Place
pageAudit.metaDescription: Discover a wide range of Fischer sports equipment at ProSkaters Place. Fischer innovation offers high-quality Alpine and Nordic ski equipment.

Flying Eagle is a renowned brand in the skating industry, known for its high-quality inline skates and roller blades. Flying Eagle is celebrated for its competitive prices and innovative designs, making it a popular choice among skating enthusiasts. ProSkaters Place is the premier retailer in the USA and Canada for Flying Eagle products, offering an extensive range of high-quality skates to suit every skater’s needs. Explore our Flying Eagle collection and find the perfect pair of skates to fuel your passion for skating!

taxonomy.description: FR is a skater-owned brand with the philosophy to create high-quality products made by skaters, for skaters. The original concept was born in Paris, France back in 2006 by Sebastien Laffargue and Gregoire Pinto, who had a vision of what Freeride skates should be - high-performance hardshell boots providing comfort, versatility, and durability. With all of these elements combined, extreme attention to detail, and a little bit of French style, the FR boot was born and it has grown to become a worldwide success. Now is the time for the FR to become its own brand and keeping in line with its roots, these boots will guide you along the way of your skating journey. FR will continue to push the limits of skating and create new standards within our industry.

taxonomy.description:
As skaters, the Mesmer Skates team wanted to create a brand that focused on the wants and needs of the skating community. Their goal was simple: Produce high quality skate products, put out great content with an amazing team, and help to contribute to the growth of our culture.

When creating the original business model for the brand, it was really important for everyone involved to make sure the skaters on the team were properly compensated. We take pride in being able to offer some of the highest royalty payments in our industry to our pro riders, and will always continue to find ways to take care of our team, and the greater community. Mesmer Skates is for skaters first.

taxonomy.description:
Mindless Longboards specialize in cruiser boards, complete longboards and trucks. Blending quality with affordability, the British brand produces longboards and cruisers for all riding styles and levels. Their boards are designed similar to the original skateboards of the 70s and 80s, meaning that they have larger wheels, allowing you to perform faster turns and give you a smoother ride over bumpy surfaces.

Mindless is renowned for using state-of-the-art techniques during the board construction process, as well as for testing its designs with experienced skaters. Furthermore, Mindless’ surfskate and longboard trucks allow you to customize your board so that you can optimise your speed and performance.

Established in 2005, Mindless is committed to environmental sustainability, sourcing maple wood from regenerative forests wherever possible. In addition to boards, the brand also produces a range of bushings and riser pads.

taxonomy.description:
The glove specialist Reusch is a worldwide operating company with almost 90 years of experience in manufacturing high-quality sports gloves and equipment. Specialized in goalkeeper gloves and winter sports gloves, Reusch is one of the world’s leading traditional glove brands.

Founded in 1934, Reusch pursues a clear goal: the development of the best gloves, consisting of high-quality materials, innovative technologies, and an outstanding fit. The expertise of Reusch as a glove specialist is not only defined by knowledge and skills but also by tradition and experience. These core competencies guarantee that every Reusch glove delivers what it promises.

Extensive knowledge of materials, thorough quality control, trustful cooperation with professional athletes, and collaboration with reliable partners ensure that every Reusch collection is developed with the highest level of expertise.

taxonomy.description:
Summit Skiboards, The best name in Alpine Skiboarding and best selection here at Proskaters Place!

Manufacturing alpine skiboards since 2002. Summit Skiboards saw the need to push the limits of the sport of alpine skiboarding and was created to produce truly high-performance skiboards. Their products are not only the most durable skiboards on the market but also made to ride in any condition and through any terrain while capturing the sheer thrill of snow riding. Skiboards make it easy to learn fast, turn quick, and ride with stability at speeds previously only experienced on skis or snowboards.

These skiboards use regular Alpine Bindings and are fully compatible with standard Alpine Ski Boots. They even can be used with snowboard boots with a special adapter.

taxonomy.description:
Born from Legacy - Built for Victory

SWINGS Speed Skating brand

Bart’s connection with skating isn’t just professional; it’s his passion, his identity.

As a key member of the Powerslide racing team for over ten years, Bart has not just endorsed products; he has lived them. His journey from a passionate athlete to a world and Olympic champion has been fueled by an ongoing quest for perfection. This search for perfection and his will to transfer his passion to the next generation of champions has led to the creation of SWINGS.

taxonomy.description: Yoko has 40 years of experience and expertise in designing and manufacturing quality sportswear using first-rate materials. Designed in Finland, where the challenging climate calls for proper equipment, our products are intended to serve their user under any circumstances, from outdoor and leisure activities to the most demanding competition conditions, regardless of the season. It is their passion and duty to manufacture exactly the right products to fit your demands, whether you are a recreational exerciser or a professional athlete.

pageAudit.title: Yoko Nordic Skis, Boots, Poles, and Apparel from Finland
pageAudit.metaDescription: Yoko - it is their passion and duty to manufacture exactly the right products to fit your demands, whether you are a recreational skier or an athlete.
